title: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
section_path_text: CLARKSONS PLATOU HELLAS - SnP WEEKLY BULLETIN
summary:
Main
After the significant S&P activity observed last week, especially driven by the VLCC segment,the wet market remains highly active, with substantial movement observed across all segments. On the dry side, although there has been some softening on rates, S&P demand remains present and acquisitions continue to emerge, with buyers adopting a cautious but opportunistic approach. Dry Cargo
This week, dry bulk activity was concentrated in the larger segments, where c/o Berge Bulk sold their scrubber-fitted Newcastlemax BERGE MOLDOVEANU (ABT 211K DWT, 2020, BOHAI, SCRUBBER), for a price in the region of USD 74 m to Korean interests.
